title: Oh... I just wish...
content:
Every other day, I just wish PHP would adopt some of the Ruby syntax so that I could do ... 
puts '(Client) Protocol versions: remote=31, negotiated=29'.split('=')[-1]

# 29
... instead of ... 
$str = '(Client) Protocol versions: remote=31, negotiated=29';
echo substr($str, strrpos($str, '=') + 1);

// 29
